title: cynanchica lactea
intro: Cynanchica lactea, also known as the White Milkvine or Cynanchum lacteum, is a perennial flowering plant in the milkweed family Apocynaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cynanchica lactea include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and skin conditions. Cynanchica lactea is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
